title: Compressed Food Mod
body:
>**Compressed Food Mod**
> -
>  If you're tired of having to eat food every minute just to regenerate your health, this mod is here to help!
> 
> _Simply combine some porkchop pieces on the crafting table, and you'll get more nutritious food._
>  _You can also make fish in a jar or a house made of beef._
> 
**I also recommend to install** [Super Saturation](https://cursefire.com/minecraft/mc-mods/super-saturation) **mod.**
> Some crafts:
> 
>![Big apple craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6913bad30b910b01705a7bca274a12bb4b6b3997.png)
> ![Food upgrader craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76a548a1f8371a6b7186a36438f00714d20a7a47.png)
>
> Currently, I cannot update this mod or translate it to English since I got my source file on other hard drive, maybe some time later I will recover it, but not now. Sorry
> 
>   Sorry vegans
